papers.name: Paper 2
papers.coverage_notes: Pure mathematics topics 10-14 plus mechanics / statistics options.

assessment_objectives.name: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Demonstrate knowledge and understanding of mathematical concepts and techniques.
classification_hints: Items asking for definitions, recall of formulae, basic calculations.

assessment_objectives.name: Apply knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Apply mathematical knowledge and understanding in solving problems.
classification_hints: Items requiring selection and application of techniques to multi-step problems.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or single-step application.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when a teacher/student/parent mode is declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: CAIE IGCSE Additional Mathematics command words (show, prove, calculate, etc.) are defined in Section 4 of the syllabus.
marking_guidance.notes: Single-tier qualification (grades A*-E). Calculator required. No practical or coursework component.
